name: Xp Malls Fundo Investimentos Imobiliarios
summary: Xp Malls Fundo Investimentos Imobiliarios is a real estate investment fund focused on acquiring and managing shopping malls in Brazil. The fund seeks to generate income and capital appreciation for investors through the rental and operation of retail spaces in its portfolio of malls. Its investment strategy involves selecting well-located malls with strong tenant mixes and potential for growth.
